/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -Wall -Wextra -Wshadow -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Woverloaded-virtual -Wunused -Wcast-align -Wformat=2 -std=c++14 -pthread -O2 -g -DNDEBUG  -Wl,-rpath=$ORIGIN -shared -Wl,-soname,librsync.so -o lib/librsync.so CMakeFiles/rsync.dir/src/rsync.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rsync.dir/src/rsyncImplementation.cpp.o   -L/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/shared_modules/dbsync/build/lib  -L/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src  -L/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/external/cJSON  -L/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/external/openssl  -Wl,-rpath,/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/shared_modules/dbsync/build/lib:/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src:/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/external/cJSON:/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/external/openssl -ldbsync -lwazuhext
